dut
module dut #(
parameter 
int 
WIDTH
 = 
32
)
(
input 
logic
clk,
input 
logic
rst_n,
input 
logic
 [31:0] 
addr,
input 
logic
 [WIDTH-1:0] 
data_in,
output 
logic
 [WIDTH-1:0] 
data_out,
output 
logic
ready
)

Simple DUT showing procedural, continuous, generate, and assertion constructs.
